0.Title:
When a charged attack hits an enemy, the target suffers 10% increased DMG from Lycaon, stacking up to 5 times and lasting 12s.
Only one stack can be gained per skill use, and repeated triggers reset the duration.
0.Lore: When a charged attack hits an enemy, the target suffers 10% increased DMG from Lycaon, stacking up to 5 times and lasting 12s. Only one stack can be gained per skill use, and repeated triggers reset the duration.

DescriptionByLevel.1:
When Lycaon completes charging during a <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color>, or activates a <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Dash Attack</color>, the Daze inflicted by the skill increases by <color=#2BAD00>40%</color>.
When <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack: Thrill of the Hunt</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack</color>, or <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack - Glacial Waltz</color> hits an enemy, the target's <color=#98EFF0>Ice RES</color> is reduced by 25%, and it increases the DMG to the target from other attributes by <color=#FFFFFF>30%</color> for 30s.
Upon entering the battlefield, Lycaon gains one <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> activation chance.
When <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> has available activations, hitting an enemy with <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack - Glacial Waltz</color> triggers the <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color> of the previous character in the squad. During this skill, when other squad members enter via <color=#FFFFFF>Quick Assist</color>, Lycaon enters the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> state for 8s.
When an elite or boss enemy becomes Stunned, 1<color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> activation chance is gained. Up to 1 <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> activation can be stored.
When the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> state ends, Lycaon automatically activates <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack - Glacial Waltz</color>. If the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> state ends early, for every 1s of remaining duration, the Daze dealt by the next <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack - Glacial Waltz</color> increases by <color=#FFFFFF>6%</color>.
When the currently active character stops attacking or uses a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color>, Lycaon will end the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> state early.
When Lycaon manually uses <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack - Glacial Waltz</color>, the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> state also ends early, but <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack - Glacial Waltz</color> will not be automatically triggered.
While the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> state is active, Lycaon will activate <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Dash Attack</color>, and <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter</color> based on the skills used by the currently active character.
When the currently active character uses a <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, Lycaon will simultaneously perform the 1st through 3rd hits of his <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color>.
When the active character performs a <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter</color>, Lycaon will simultaneously perform a <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge</color> or <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter</color>. After performing a <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter</color> while in the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> state, Lycaon can immediately follow up with the 3rd hit of his <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color>.
While the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> state is active, when Lycaon is not the currently active Agent, his attacks only deal DMG and Daze. While Lycaon is the currently active character, the <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> duration does not decrease.

MathSkill.Title: Additional Ability: Elegant Predator
MathSkill.Description:
When another character in your squad is an <color=#FFFFFF>Anomaly</color> character or shares the same Attribute or Faction:
When Lycaon hits a Stunned enemy, the target's Stun DMG Multiplier increases by 35%.

AwakenAbility.Title: Potential Awakening: Glacial Rush
AwakenAbility.Description: While <color=#FFFFFF>Encircle Prey</color> is active, when Lycaon performs a <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color>, <color=#FFFFFF>Dash Attack</color>, or <color=#FFFFFF>Dodge Counter</color> as a non-active Agent, his Impact is increased by <color=#2BAD00>12.5%</color>.

114100001.Title: Basic Attack: Moon Hunter
114100001.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to activate:
Unleashes up to 5 strikes in front, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.
Hold down <IconMap:Icon_Normal> to charge up, increasing the power of the attack and dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.

114100002.Title: Special Attack: Time to Hunt
114100002.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Special> to activate:
Unleashes a series of strikes in front, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Hold down <IconMap:Icon_Special> to charge up, increasing its power.
Anti-Interrupt level is increased while using this skill.

114100003.Title: EX Special Attack: Thrill of the Hunt
114100003.Description:
With enough Energy, press <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to activate:
Unleashes a series of powerful strikes in front, dealing massive <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Hold down <IconMap:Icon_SpecialReady> to charge up, consuming Energy and enhancing the power of the attack.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114110029.Title: EX Special Attack: Thrill of the Hunt

114100004.Title: Dodge: Suitable Positioning
114100004.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Evade> to activate:
A quick dash dodge.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114100005.Title: Dash Attack: Keep it Clean
114100005.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a dodge to activate:
Slides forward, launching a series of strikes in front, dealing <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color>.

114100006.Title: Dodge Counter: Etiquette Manual
114100006.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> during a <color=#FFFFFF>Perfect Dodge</color> to activate:
Strikes enemies in front, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114100007.Title: Chain Attack: As You Wish
114100007.Description:
When a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color> is triggered, select the character to activate:
Unleashes a series of powerful strikes at enemies in a small area in front of him, dealing massive <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114100008.Title: Ultimate: Mission Complete
114100008.Description:
When Decibel Rating is at <color=#FFFFFF>Maximum</color>, press <IconMap:Icon_UltimateReady> to activate:
Unleashes multiple powerful strikes at enemies in a large area, dealing massive <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114100011.Title: Quick Assist: Wolf Pack
114100011.Description:
When the active character is launched, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Strikes enemies in front, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114100013.Title: Defensive Assist: Disrupted Hunt
114100013.Description:
When the on-field character is about to be attacked, press <IconMap:Icon_Switch> to activate:
Parries the enemy's attack, dealing massive Daze.
This skill excels at parrying enemy attacks and reduces the consumption of <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Points</color> when the character is under intense attacks.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114100014.Title: Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack
114100014.Description:
Press <IconMap:Icon_Normal> after a <color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</color> to activate:
Creates an icicle in front, which strikes all enemies within range, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114100015.Title: Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack - Glacial Waltz
114100015.Description:
Hold <IconMap:Icon_Normal> after a <color=#FFFFFF>Defensive Assist</color> to activate:
Quickly launch multiple strikes against enemies in front, dealing <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color>.
Character is invulnerable while using this skill.

114110058.Title: Assist Follow-Up: Vengeful Counterattack - Glacial Waltz
